title: Tax' Cave Packer
description: Cave Packer is a Minecraft resourcepack aims to add art to the Cave Horror Project menu.
body:
![00](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8df74ee816f52bc753d474af542ce60dc989686.png)

Overiew:
Cave Packer is a Minecraft resourcepack aims to add art to the Caev Horror Project menu. It contain the textures to serve the optimized menu style.
![01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80f3fbdee42c135f264b094cb7679c17dd9c663b.png) 

Cooperation:
This pack is aspecially written for the Cave Horror Project modpack. Try out this amazing pack.


Installation:
Just drag and drop the .zip file in the folder located at .mineraft/resourcepacks, or just simply use the Curseforge client.


Permission:
You are allowed and welcome to use this resourcepasck in your modpack. 
 

Credit:
Written by Taknax.
